paradigm.actual: layered/n-tier (with a functional-core + imperative-shell grain inside the theme module)
evidence: app/src/types/index.ts:8 — type-only layer: AppThemeName union, Settings, STORAGE_KEYS; no logic
app/src/lib/theme.ts:86-204 — domain logic layer: pure createTheme() transforms flat input into Chakra ThemeOverride; no React, no side effects
app/src/lib/storage.ts:61-76 — persistence layer over localStorage; imports normalizeThemeName from domain, never from hooks/pages
app/src/hooks/useMoodTheme.tsx:14-45 — application-state layer: AppThemeProvider owns useState + localStorage side effect; imports inward only
app/src/hooks/useThemeStyles.ts:325-350 — derived-presentation layer: reads context, returns Chakra BoxProps
app/pages/_app.tsx:40 — shell layer: ChakraProvider at root consumes activeTheme; pages are pure consumers
app/src/lib/theme.ts:677-753 — functional core (APP_THEMES static record + pure accessors) + imperative shell in useMoodTheme.tsx

theme_module_map.name: AppThemeName union + Settings type
theme_module_map.boundary_notes: No logic; imported by theme.ts, storage.ts, useMoodTheme.tsx, profile.tsx. Adding a theme edits this file today; spec migrates to generated-registry import.

theme_module_map.name: Theme registry + public API
theme_module_map.owns: createTheme() (86-204), 5 inlined theme objects (206-675), APP_THEMES (677), DEFAULT_THEME_NAME (735), isAppThemeName/normalizeThemeName/getThemeDefinition/getChakraTheme (737-751), ThemeVisualStyle (17), AppThemeDefinition (51)
theme_module_map.boundary_notes: extendTheme() called 5x eagerly at import. ThemeVisualStyle drives all switches in useThemeStyles.ts.

theme_module_map.name: AppThemeProvider + useAppTheme
theme_module_map.owns: AppThemeContext, provider (useState + 2 useEffects + writeSettings), useAppTheme(), useMoodTheme() alias
theme_module_map.boundary_notes: Only module that calls writeSettings for theme; sets document.documentElement.dataset.theme (27); getChakraTheme/getThemeDefinition are O(1) lookups.

theme_module_map.name: useThemeStyles
theme_module_map.owns: pattern constants (12-25), 5 switch fns surfaceOverlay/cardOverlay/buttonOverlay/contentPanel/navOverlay (27-176), BANNER_SVG map (179-292), navBannerDecor (301-323), useThemeStyles hook (325-350)
theme_module_map.boundary_notes: 7 switch blocks keyed on ThemeVisualStyle. BANNER_SVG is the inline-SVG data that moves into manifests (D4). contentPanelStyle gated on activeThemeDefinition.contentSurface (340).

theme_module_map.name: ThemeIcon
theme_module_map.owns: ICON_MAP with 3 sub-keys pixel/toy/default (12-73), ThemeIcon (84), getThemeIconId() (116)
theme_module_map.boundary_notes: Icon resolution is a 3-way branch not 5-way — soft/rounded/floral fall through to default. Map moves to treatments/iconSets.ts.

theme_module_map.name: Font loader
theme_module_map.owns: single hardcoded Google Fonts CSS2 URL (DM Serif Display, Fredoka, Nunito, Press Start 2P, VT323)
theme_module_map.boundary_notes: Union-loads all fonts (spec non-goal: no lazy loading). Spec migrates to generated THEME_FONTS.

theme_module_map.name: Theme picker UI
theme_module_map.owns: button list over Object.values(APP_THEMES); preview box reading backgroundImage/labelKey/descriptionKey
theme_module_map.boundary_notes: Imports APP_THEMES directly (32). labelKey/descriptionKey disappear post-migration; labels come from manifest.label.

theme_module_map.name: Settings persistence + normalizeThemeName
theme_module_map.owns: readSettings with normalizeThemeName fallback (63), writeSettings normalizes (73), legacy mood fallback
theme_module_map.boundary_notes: isAppThemeName does 'value in APP_THEMES' — registry keyset is the runtime source of valid ids. US5/AC15 path.

current_theme_coupling: app/src/types/index.ts:8 — AppThemeName hardcoded union; theme addition edits this file
app/src/lib/theme.ts:17 — ThemeVisualStyle closed union; new variant edits this file
app/src/lib/theme.ts:677-733 — APP_THEMES record inlines all 5 themes; extendTheme() 5x at import
app/src/lib/theme.ts:9-15 — ThemeTextKey/ThemeDescriptionKey mirror ids for i18n typing
app/src/hooks/useThemeStyles.ts:28-176 — 5 switch fns on visualStyle (toy/pixel/floral branches; soft/rounded fall through)
app/src/hooks/useThemeStyles.ts:179-292 — BANNER_SVG Record with 5 keys = 5 visualStyles
app/pages/_document.tsx:9-13 — Google Fonts URL hardcodes all 5 themes' families
app/pages/profile.tsx:32,233,262 — imports APP_THEMES directly; reads labelKey/descriptionKey as i18n keys
app/src/lib/storage.ts:6 — imports normalizeThemeName/DEFAULT_THEME_NAME; registry keyset defines validity

build_pipeline_facts.bundler: webpack via Next.js 14 (next.config.mjs:30); swcMinify:false; next-swc-loader workaround for ts-mls/marmot-ts/post-quantum/hpke (33-50)
build_pipeline_facts.output_mode: output:'export' fully static to app/out/ (next.config.mjs:20); trailingSlash:true; no server runtime
build_pipeline_facts.codegen_precedent: app/scripts/generate-avatar-manifest.mjs — plain Node ESM; fs/promises + fetch; writes src/data/avatarManifest.json (143); process.exitCode=1 on error (150-153); no TS runner
build_pipeline_facts.ts_runner: none (no tsx/ts-node/@swc/node); vitest imports TS natively
build_pipeline_facts.test_runner: vitest ^4.0.18; config app/vitest.config.ts includes tests/unit/**/*.test.ts; alias @ -> app/; coverage v8
make_targets: Makefile:93 build -> ensure-deps -> cd app && npm run build
Makefile:109 test-unit -> cd app && npx vitest run
Makefile:58-66 ensure-deps -> platform stamp; npm ci when package.json/lock newer

constraints: next.config.mjs:20 output:'export' -> no runtime FS reads; detection must be build-time codegen emitting a static registry
package.json -> no tsx/ts-node; generator must be plain Node ESM .mjs run via node
_app.tsx:40 ChakraProvider consumes a Chakra ThemeOverride; buildChakraTheme() must keep emitting one
types/index.ts:8 AppThemeName is a TS union; generated registry must export it (or types imports from registry) — enforced at TS compile

theme.ts:17 ThemeVisualStyle drives 7 switches; decomposing (D2) must preserve useThemeStyles return shape (AC10): cardStyle/surfaceStyle/navStyle/buttonStyle/contentPanelStyle/bannerDecorStyle/isFunTheme consumed by Layout.tsx:51 and index.tsx:19
_document.tsx:9-13 union font link; spec preserves union (no lazy); generated THEME_FONTS must produce equivalent union URL
storage.ts:63,73 normalizeThemeName via isAppThemeName ('value in APP_THEMES'); APP_THEMES must stay Record keyed by same ids so AC15 fallback holds
Makefile:58-66 + CLAUDE.md cross-platform node_modules platform stamp; generator is pure Node, unaffected
next.config.mjs:26 swcMinify:false; SWC crashes on bitwise in ts-mls — new bundle output must avoid bitwise or route via next-swc-loader
assumptions: zod NOT installed (absent from deps + devDeps); must be added before schema.ts
i18n.ts contains per-theme label/description keys (inferred from profile.tsx:233,262)
new themes-validation.test.ts must land at app/tests/unit/ to be picked up without config change
no 'prebuild' script yet; adding it is a package.json edit
app/src/themes/ is net-new (schema, buildChakraTheme, treatments, index, 5 manifests, registry.generated.ts)
BANNER_SVG (useThemeStyles.ts:179-292) must migrate to manifest.banner; spec 'files touched' says only 'treatment lookup' — implicit dependency
AC9 byte-identical getChakraTheme output: extendTheme() merges Chakra defaults and may not serialize deterministically — snapshot capture must handle this BEFORE any refactor

codegen_patterns.what: plain Node ESM; process.exitCode=1 on fatal; fs.writeFile with JSON.stringify(...,null,2)+'\n'; console.log count
codegen_patterns.reuse: direct scaffold for generate-theme-registry.mjs; differs only in input (local glob vs fetch) and output (.ts with imports vs .json)
lift into buildChakraTheme.ts unchanged (used by all 5 themes)
direct precursor to buildChakraTheme(ThemeManifest): preserve extendTheme/semanticTokens/components structure

registry_or_manifest_patterns.pattern: generated JSON with generatedAt/total/typed arrays; committed to repo; consumer casts type locally
registry_or_manifest_patterns.notes: theme registry is .ts (carries static imports + union type export). generatedAt timestamp worth keeping for drift detection. commit the generated file.

registry_or_manifest_patterns.pattern: consumer imports generated JSON + local type + cast
registry_or_manifest_patterns.notes: @/src/data/ is the established location for generated data; .ts registry avoids the cast

validation_patterns.how: vitest; imports generated manifest directly; one it() per invariant; structured regression-comment header (bug/date/root-cause/protection)
imports APP_THEMES + getChakraTheme; contentSurface + minecraft font-size ordering; toBe/toBeFalsy/toBeGreaterThan; NO snapshots
validation_patterns.notes: source for AC12; migrate to registry

validation_patterns.how: vitest present; zod NOT present anywhere
validation_patterns.notes: D3 adds zod as a genuine new dependency

existing_docs.format: # ADR-NNN: Title; bold Status/Date/Type/Affects/Supersedes/Superseded-by front-matter; ## Context; ## Decision. Type seen: 'Lightweight'. Status can be 'Proposed' or 'Accepted'.

existing_docs.relevance: existing theme IP note; authoring guide should live under docs/ tree (docs/themes/authoring-guide.md), not app/

i18n_convention.how: add key to Copy type; add value under copy.en AND copy.de; dynamic strings are arrow fns; consume via useCopy(); never hardcode in components
i18n_convention.theme_keys: copy.settings.{calm,playful,lego,minecraft,flower} + {calm..flower}Description; en ~545-557, de ~1001-1013. Remove all 10 per-language keys (AC13). KEEP themeHeading/themeDescription/active/currentTheme.

test_conventions.runner: vitest ^4.0.18; include tests/unit/**/*.test.ts; alias @ -> project root
test_conventions.snapshot_support: NONE — zero toMatchSnapshot hits. AC9 byte-identical must use expect(...).toEqual(...) against a pre-captured object, not vitest snapshots.

reuse_recommendations: theme.ts:677-733 APP_THEMES — exact source of truth for the 5 manifests (field-for-field, no re-tuning)
theme.ts:737-751 public API — preserve signatures in themes/index.ts, re-export from lib/theme.ts (6 consumers)
useThemeStyles.ts:179-292 BANNER_SVG — lift per-theme into manifest.banner
theme.test.ts — migrate contentSurface + minecraft font invariants
ADR-001 header format — match for the new ADR
types/index.ts:8 AppThemeName — import from registry.generated.ts post-epic; Settings shape unchanged
